title: Admit EDTS Visible Progress Release 1 as provisional interactive visual demonstrator
summary: Ship an interactive 3D demonstrator (Factory ICE / Deconstruction / EV Proposal) using procedural PLACEHOLDER_GEOMETRY scaled only to ASSERTION_EXTRACTED layout dimensions. Does not invent torque, materials, mounts, or claim VERIFIED geometry. Does not authorize L10 public demo, procedure generation, or geometry freeze. Viewer is a non-kernel parallel lane that can refine as evidence arrives.
honesty_constraints: All meshes default PLACEHOLDER_GEOMETRY or DESIGN_PROPOSAL / BLOCKED
Layout dims only from SRC-CAND-000010 ASSERTION_EXTRACTED tokens
Factory vs EV proposal families visually and metadata-separated
MEPQ blockers surfaced in inspector — not papered over
